---
title: "Research"
title-block-banner: true
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<div style="max-width:1280px; margin:0rem auto 2rem auto; padding:0 0.35rem;"><div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:72px 1fr 72px; gap:0.7rem; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1rem;"><button id="mini-prev" type="button" style="position:relative; z-index:40; width:54px; height:54px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.24); background:rgba(14,27,50,0.82); color:#f5efe2; font-size:2rem; cursor:pointer;">‹</button><div style="overflow:visible;"><div style="max-width:980px; margin:0 auto; overflow:visible;"><div id="mini-stage" style="position:relative; height:600px; overflow:hidden; perspective:2400px; border-radius:1.2rem; background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(18,34,63,0.44), rgba(10,19,36,0.34)); border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.10); box-shadow:0 18px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);"><div class="mini-card" data-index="0" style="position:absolute; top:43%; left:50%; width:188px; min-height:510px; transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(0) translateZ(0) scale(1) rotateY(0deg); transform-style:preserve-3d; opacity:1; z-index:6; transition:all 0.5s ease; background:transparent; border:none; border-radius:1rem; overflow:visible; padding:0.18rem; box-shadow:none;"><div class="mini-card-title" style="margin-bottom:0.5rem; text-align:center; color:#d8be8a; font-size:1.02rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1.14; text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);">Angular Momentum Transport in Molecular Clouds</div><img class="mini-card-img" src="images/research/mosaico_ALL_CT.png" alt="Angular Momentum Transport in Molecular Clouds" style="display:block; width:100%; height:414px; max-width:100%; margin:0 auto 0.62rem auto; object-fit:contain; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border-radius:0.78rem; padding:0.02rem; box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);"><button type="button" class="topic-btn" data-topic="clouds" style="display:block; width:max-content; min-width:134px; margin:0 auto; padding:0.78rem 1rem; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.34); background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(216,190,138,0.97), rgba(232,208,164,0.93)); color:#08111f; font-size:0.96rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);">Open me!</button></div><div class="mini-card" data-index="1" style="position:absolute; top:43%; left:50%; width:160px; min-height:432px; transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(355px) translateZ(-210px) scale(0.84) rotateY(-34deg); transform-style:preserve-3d; opacity:0.6; z-index:4; transition:all 0.5s ease; background:transparent; border:none; border-radius:1rem; overflow:visible; padding:0.16rem; box-shadow:none;"><div class="mini-card-title" style="margin-bottom:0.36rem; text-align:center; color:#d8be8a; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1.1; text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.32);">Active Torques in Molecular Clouds</div><img class="mini-card-img" src="images/research/torques.png" alt="Active Torques in Molecular Clouds" style="display:block; width:100%; height:348px; max-width:100%; margin:0 auto 0.44rem auto; object-fit:contain; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border-radius:0.76rem; padding:0.02rem; box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);"><button type="button" class="topic-btn" data-topic="torques" style="display:block; width:max-content; min-width:114px; margin:0 auto; padding:0.62rem 0.8rem; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.34); background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(216,190,138,0.94), rgba(232,208,164,0.90)); color:#08111f; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);">Open me!</button></div><div class="mini-card" data-index="2" style="position:absolute; top:43%; left:50%; width:160px; min-height:432px; transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(-355px) translateZ(-210px) scale(0.84) rotateY(34deg); transform-style:preserve-3d; opacity:0.6; z-index:4; transition:all 0.5s ease; background:transparent; border:none; border-radius:1rem; overflow:visible; padding:0.16rem; box-shadow:none;"><div class="mini-card-title" style="margin-bottom:0.36rem; text-align:center; color:#d8be8a; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1.1; text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.32);">Angular Momentum Transport in Filaments</div><img class="mini-card-img" src="images/research/models.png" alt="Angular Momentum Transport in Filaments" style="display:block; width:100%; height:348px; max-width:100%; margin:0 auto 0.44rem auto; object-fit:contain; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border-radius:0.76rem; padding:0.02rem; box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);"><button type="button" class="topic-btn" data-topic="filaments" style="display:block; width:max-content; min-width:114px; margin:0 auto; padding:0.62rem 0.8rem; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.34); background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(216,190,138,0.94), rgba(232,208,164,0.90)); color:#08111f; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);">Open me!</button></div><div class="mini-card" data-index="3" style="position:absolute; top:43%; left:50%; width:142px; min-height:378px; transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(565px) translateZ(-370px) scale(0.68) rotateY(-42deg); transform-style:preserve-3d; opacity:0.2; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; transition:all 0.5s ease; background:transparent; border:none; border-radius:1rem; overflow:visible; padding:0.12rem; box-shadow:none; filter:blur(0.7px);"><div class="mini-card-title" style="margin-bottom:0.24rem; text-align:center; color:#d8be8a; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1.05; text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">Synthetic Observations</div><img class="mini-card-img" src="images/research/RT_filament.png" alt="Synthetic Observations" style="display:block; width:100%; height:300px; max-width:100%; margin:0 auto 0.3rem auto; object-fit:contain; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border-radius:0.74rem; padding:0.02rem; box-shadow:0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);"><button type="button" class="topic-btn" data-topic="synthetic" style="display:block; width:max-content; min-width:102px; margin:0 auto; padding:0.52rem 0.68rem; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.34); background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(216,190,138,0.92), rgba(232,208,164,0.88)); color:#08111f; font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);">Open me!</button></div></div></div></div><button id="mini-next" type="button" style="position:relative; z-index:40; width:54px; height:54px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.24); background:rgba(14,27,50,0.82); color:#f5efe2; font-size:2rem; cursor:pointer;">›</button></div><div id="research-panel" style="display:none; background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14,27,50,0.84), rgba(10,19,36,0.88)); border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.12); border-radius:1.1rem; padding:1.55rem 1.45rem; box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.20);"><div id="research-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:0.9rem; color:#d8be8a; font-size:1.16rem; font-weight:600; text-align:center;"></div><div id="research-panel-text" style="color:#dce5f7; line-height:1.72; margin-bottom:1.1rem;"></div><button id="research-close-bottom" type="button" style="display:block; margin:0 auto; padding:0.7rem 1rem; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,190,138,0.24); background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color:#f5efe2; font-size:0.92rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;">Close</button></div></div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var prev = document.getElementById("mini-prev");
  var next = document.getElementById("mini-next");
  var panel = document.getElementById("research-panel");
  var panelTitle = document.getElementById("research-panel-title");
  var panelText = document.getElementById("research-panel-text");
  var closeBottom = document.getElementById("research-close-bottom");
  var openTopic = null;
  var cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".mini-card"));
  var current = 0;

 function makePanelHTML(paragraph, img1, img2, img3) {
  return '<div style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto 1.2rem auto; text-align:center;">' +
    '<p style="margin:0; color:#dce5f7; line-height:1.8;">' + paragraph + '</p>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1.2rem; margin:1.2rem 0 1.4rem 0; justify-content:flex-start;">' +
      '<img src="' + img1 + '" alt="figure" style="width:45%; min-width:240px; max-width:420px; border-radius:0.9rem; box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.20);">' +
      '<div style="flex:1; color:#dce5f7; line-height:1.75;">This example highlights how complex structure emerges across scales and how morphology can be used to connect dynamical evolution with observable signatures in a simple visual way.</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1.2rem; margin:1.2rem 0 1.4rem 0; justify-content:flex-start;">' +
      '<div style="flex:1; color:#dce5f7; line-height:1.75; text-align:right;">Here I compare different stages or physical interpretations, emphasizing how the same system can be read through kinematics, geometry, and transport processes acting simultaneously.</div>' +
      '<img src="' + img2 + '" alt="figure" style="width:45%; min-width:240px; max-width:420px; border-radius:0.9rem; box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.20);">' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1.2rem; margin:1.2rem 0 0.5rem 0; justify-content:flex-start;">' +
      '<img src="' + img3 + '" alt="figure" style="width:45%; min-width:240px; max-width:420px; border-radius:0.9rem; box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.20);">' +
      '<div style="flex:1; color:#dce5f7; line-height:1.75;">This final example can be used to point out the broader interpretation of the results, linking numerical experiments, structural evolution, and potential comparison with observational data.</div>' +
    '</div>';
}

var content = {
  clouds: {
    title: "Angular Momentum Transport in Molecular Clouds",
    text: makePanelHTML(
      "This section introduces the broad question of how angular momentum is acquired, redistributed, and transported during cloud evolution and collapse, with attention to gravity, turbulence, and magnetic structure.",
      "images/research/j_R_S3e1.png",
      "images/research/c2083_visual.png",
      "images/research/am_evolution_separ_3e3.png"
    )
  },
  torques: {
    title: "Active Torques in Molecular Clouds",
    text: makePanelHTML(
      "This section focuses on the torques that can act inside molecular-cloud environments and on how their relative contribution may vary with geometry, environment, and evolutionary state.",
      "images/research/jR_HDG_ct20_14_15_16Myr.jpeg",
      "images/research/torque_equation.png",
      "images/research/torques_hist_MHDG_ff3.jpg"
    )
  },
  filaments: {
    title: "Angular Momentum Transport in Filaments",
    text: makePanelHTML(
      "This section explores the possibility that filamentary flows do more than feed mass: they may also channel, redirect, and reorganize angular momentum toward embedded collapse centers.",
      "images/research/heat_cos_3Dangles-2.png",
      "images/research/heat_cos_3Dangles_vel_full_only05.png",
      "images/research/f_N.jpeg"
    )
  },
  synthetic: {
    title: "Synthetic Observations",
    text: makePanelHTML(
      "This section shows how synthetic observations can bridge the gap between simulations and observable diagnostics, helping interpret structure, emission, and kinematics in a consistent way.",
      "images/research/Filament_1.png",
      "images/research/profile_.png",
      "images/research/RTlines.png"
    )
  }
};

  function resetButtons() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".topic-btn").forEach(function (btn) {
      btn.innerHTML = "Open me!";
    });
  }

  function closePanel() {
    panel.style.display = "none";
    panelTitle.innerHTML = "";
    panelText.innerHTML = "";
    openTopic = null;
    resetButtons();
  }

  function openPanel(topic, button) {
    if (content[topic]) {
      panel.style.display = "block";
      panelTitle.innerHTML = content[topic].title;
      panelText.innerHTML = content[topic].text;
      openTopic = topic;
      resetButtons();
      if (button) button.innerHTML = "Close";
      setTimeout(function () {
        var y = panel.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - 70;
        window.scrollTo({ top: y, behavior: "smooth" });
      }, 80);
    }
  }

  function positionFor(offset, total) {
    var half = Math.floor(total / 2);
    var signed = offset;
    if (signed > half) signed = signed - total;
    return signed;
  }

  function renderCards() {
    var total = cards.length;
    cards.forEach(function (card, i) {
      var img = card.querySelector(".mini-card-img");
      var title = card.querySelector(".mini-card-title");
      var btn = card.querySelector(".topic-btn");
      var rawOffset = (i - current + total) % total;
      var pos = positionFor(rawOffset, total);

      card.style.top = "46%";

      if (pos === 0) {
        card.style.width = "188px";
        card.style.minHeight = "510px";
        card.style.transform = "translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(0) translateZ(0) scale(1) rotateY(0deg)";
        card.style.opacity = "1";
        card.style.zIndex = "6";
        card.style.pointerEvents = "auto";
        card.style.filter = "blur(0)";
        card.style.padding = "0.18rem";
        if (img) img.style.height = "414px";
        if (title) title.style.fontSize = "1.02rem";
        if (title) title.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontSize = "0.96rem";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.padding = "0.78rem 1rem";
      } else if (pos === 1) {
        card.style.width = "160px";
        card.style.minHeight = "432px";
        card.style.transform = "translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(355px) translateZ(-210px) scale(0.84) rotateY(-34deg)";
        card.style.opacity = "0.6";
        card.style.zIndex = "4";
        card.style.pointerEvents = "auto";
        card.style.filter = "blur(0)";
        card.style.padding = "0.16rem";
        if (img) img.style.height = "348px";
        if (title) title.style.fontSize = "0.84rem";
        if (title) title.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontSize = "0.82rem";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.padding = "0.62rem 0.8rem";
      } else if (pos === -1) {
        card.style.width = "160px";
        card.style.minHeight = "432px";
        card.style.transform = "translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(-355px) translateZ(-210px) scale(0.84) rotateY(34deg)";
        card.style.opacity = "0.6";
        card.style.zIndex = "4";
        card.style.pointerEvents = "auto";
        card.style.filter = "blur(0)";
        card.style.padding = "0.16rem";
        if (img) img.style.height = "348px";
        if (title) title.style.fontSize = "0.84rem";
        if (title) title.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontSize = "0.82rem";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.padding = "0.62rem 0.8rem";
      } else if (pos === 2) {
        card.style.width = "142px";
        card.style.minHeight = "378px";
        card.style.transform = "translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(565px) translateZ(-370px) scale(0.68) rotateY(-42deg)";
        card.style.opacity = "0.2";
        card.style.zIndex = "2";
        card.style.pointerEvents = "none";
        card.style.filter = "blur(0.7px)";
        card.style.padding = "0.12rem";
        if (img) img.style.height = "300px";
        if (title) title.style.fontSize = "0.72rem";
        if (title) title.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontSize = "0.74rem";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.padding = "0.52rem 0.68rem";
      } else if (pos === -2) {
        card.style.width = "142px";
        card.style.minHeight = "378px";
        card.style.transform = "translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(-565px) translateZ(-370px) scale(0.68) rotateY(42deg)";
        card.style.opacity = "0.2";
        card.style.zIndex = "2";
        card.style.pointerEvents = "none";
        card.style.filter = "blur(0.7px)";
        card.style.padding = "0.12rem";
        if (img) img.style.height = "300px";
        if (title) title.style.fontSize = "0.72rem";
        if (title) title.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontSize = "0.74rem";
        if (btn) btn.style.fontWeight = "600";
        if (btn) btn.style.padding = "0.52rem 0.68rem";
      } else {
        card.style.width = "126px";
        card.style.minHeight = "340px";
        card.style.transform = "translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(0) translateZ(-470px) scale(0.56) rotateY(0deg)";
        card.style.opacity = "0";
        card.style.zIndex = "1";
        card.style.pointerEvents = "none";
        card.style.filter = "blur(1px)";
        card.style.padding = "0.08rem";
        if (img) img.style.height = "270px";
      }
    });
  }

  if (next) {
    next.onclick = function () {
      current = (current + 1) % cards.length;
      renderCards();
      closePanel();
    };
  }

  if (prev) {
    prev.onclick = function () {
      current = (current - 1 + cards.length) % cards.length;
      renderCards();
      closePanel();
    };
  }

  var buttons = document.querySelectorAll(".topic-btn");
  buttons.forEach(function (btn) {
    btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      var topic = this.getAttribute("data-topic");
      if (openTopic === topic) {
        closePanel();
      } else {
        openPanel(topic, this);
      }
    });
  });

  if (closeBottom) {
    closeBottom.onclick = function () {
      closePanel();
    };
  }

  renderCards();
});
</script>
